findings.description: Hyperlinks present in the source PDF have been stripped of their interactive link tags in the HTML.
findings.evidence: The PDF contains functional hyperlinks for text such as 'Division's website' and 'training video' on page 1, '(available here)' and 'US Environmental Protection Agency' on page 2, and 'Division's website' on page 5. In the HTML, these are rendered as plain text without `<a>` tags or `href` attributes.
